query:
DELETE t1 FROM product_channel_goals t1
INNER JOIN product_channel_goals t2 
WHERE t1.id > t2.id 
AND t1.productId = t2.productId 
AND t1.channelId = t2.channelId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2tDCoiftG3qjZjj.5b66511f9aa5 --database CVZ7vhL7YTVF6G9KYmzLvT --execute DELETE t1 FROM product_channel_goals t1
INNER JOIN product_channel_goals t2 
WHERE t1.id > t2.id 
AND t1.productId = t2.productId 
AND t1.channelId = t2.channelId;
